# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_passcode_profile (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Object name.

### Optional

- `allow_simple_passcode` (Boolean) The passcode length is 4 and only numeric values allowed.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `color` (String) Color of the object. Should be one of existing colors.
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `domains_to_process` (String) Indicates which domains to process the commands on. It cannot be used with the details-level full, must be run from the System Domain only and with ignore-warnings true. Valid values are, CURRENT_DOMAIN, ALL_DOMAINS_ON_THIS_SERVER.
- `enable_inactivity_time_lock` (Boolean) Lock the device if app is inactive.
- `enable_passcode_failed_attempts` (Boolean) Exit after few failures in passcode verification.
- `enable_passcode_history` (Boolean) Check passcode history for reparations.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force_passcode_expiration` (Boolean) Enable/disable expiration date to the passcode.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `max_inactivity_time_lock` (Number) Time without user input before passcode must be re-entered (in minutes).
- `max_passcode_failed_attempts` (Number) Number of failed attempts allowed.
- `min_passcode_complex_characters` (Number) Minimum number of complex characters (if "require-alphanumeric-passcode" is enabled). The number of the complex characters cannot be greater than number of the passcode length.
- `min_passcode_length` (Number) Minimum passcode length - relevant if "allow-simple-passcode" is disable.
- `passcode_expiration_period` (Number) The period in days after which the passcode will expire.
- `passcode_history` (Number) Number of passcodes that will be kept in history.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `require_alphanumeric_passcode` (Boolean) Require alphanumeric characters in the passcode - relevant if "allow-simple-passcode" is disable.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_passcode_profile` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
